description.value: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame. All creatures in a 20-foot radius sphere take [[/damage 28 type=fire]] damage. Each target takes the full listed damage and makes their own save.

system.effect: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame. All creatures in a 20-foot radius sphere take 28 fire damage. Each target takes the full listed damage and makes their own save.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = Fails, 1 = Half damage (14), 2 = Full damage (28), 3 = Enhanced damage (36) + ignited
system.weavingRoll: Fire Potential + Fire Mastery + Space Potential + Space Mastery
